<final_evaluation>
{
    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "6, ['Smart Home Integration add-on (automation and energy monitoring not covered by any template field)', 'Premium Insurance Membership discount program (membership and discount feature not in schema)', 'Employer benefit contribution percentage (30% reduction not directly representable)', 'Replacement value guarantee and luxury concierge claim service (claim service quality not represented)', 'Private jet coverage (no field for private or luxury travel mode coverage)', 'Exclusions list (cosmetic procedures, elective surgeries, etc.) — exclusions not modeled in template']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "15, ['Health insurance plans with physical and mental coverage, monthly cost, and coverage tiers', 'Inclusion of telemedicine and wellness programs', '24/7 emergency and dedicated agent support', 'Property insurance with luxury items and electronics coverage', 'Travel insurance with medical evacuation and global assistance', 'Premium medical network add-on (maps to premium_medical_network_addon)', 'Executive wellness programs (maps to health_insurance_specific → stress_management_programs / executive_health_programs)', 'Employer package available and employer monthly cost (company_benefits)', 'Family dependents coverage and transition to standalone policy (family_coverage)', 'Global coverage and international travel protection (geographic_coverage)', 'Mental health coverage including crisis intervention and therapy (health_insurance_specific)', 'Cost breakdown with monthly and annual cost and savings (cost_analysis)', 'Concierge services, priority claims, and dedicated agent (service_features)', 'Coverage confirmation and binding proposal ready (confirmation_status / documentation_status)', 'Enrollment confirmation request (confirmation_status → enrollment_instructions_provided)']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 6, ['Smart Home Integration add-on (automation and energy monitoring not covered by any template field)', 'Premium Insurance Membership discount program (membership and discount feature not in schema)', 'Employer benefit contribution percentage (30% reduction not directly representable)', 'Replacement value guarantee and luxury concierge claim service (claim service quality not represented)', 'Private jet coverage (no field for private or luxury travel mode coverage)', 'Exclusions list (cosmetic procedures, elective surgeries, etc.) — exclusions not modeled in template']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
Q2.A: 15, ['Health insurance plans with physical and mental coverage, monthly cost, and coverage tiers', 'Inclusion of telemedicine and wellness programs', '24/7 emergency and dedicated agent support', 'Property insurance with luxury items and electronics coverage', 'Travel insurance with medical evacuation and global assistance', 'Premium medical network add-on (maps to premium_medical_network_addon)', 'Executive wellness programs (maps to health_insurance_specific → stress_management_programs / executive_health_programs)', 'Employer package available and employer monthly cost (company_benefits)', 'Family dependents coverage and transition to standalone policy (family_coverage)', 'Global coverage and international travel protection (geographic_coverage)', 'Mental health coverage including crisis intervention and therapy (health_insurance_specific)', 'Cost breakdown with monthly and annual cost and savings (cost_analysis)', 'Concierge services, priority claims, and dedicated agent (service_features)', 'Coverage confirmation and binding proposal ready (confirmation_status / documentation_status)', 'Enrollment confirmation request (confirmation_status → enrollment_instructions_provided)']
